title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Implement domain logic for URL shortener service including entities and value objects.
steps.done_condition: Domain logic is implemented with necessary tests passing.

steps.description: Define ports interfaces for URL shortener service interactions.
steps.done_condition: Ports interfaces are defined and tests confirm their signatures.

steps.description: Implement in-memory storage as a secondary adapter for storing URLs.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage is operational and tested using the defined ports.

steps.description: Develop HTTP handler as a primary adapter for URL shortener API endpoints.
steps.done_condition: HTTP handler is functional and integrates with the defined ports, with passing tests.

steps.description: Implement use cases for shortening URLs and retrieving original URLs.
steps.done_condition: Use cases are fully implemented with unit tests passing.

steps.description: Assemble components in the composition root to wire up adapters to ports.
steps.done_condition: Composition root is correctly wiring all components, enabling the application to start.

steps.description: Create integration tests to validate the functionality of the entire URL shortener application.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests run successfully and validate API functionality.

successCriteria: API successfully shortens URLs and retrieves them.
All tests for each component pass successfully.
Project deployable as a single binary.
